title: Polymarket removes wagers on U.S. service member rescue mission in Iran
summary_full: Rep. Seth Moulton, D-Mass., called the market "DISGUSTING" and said bettors were wagering on whether American troops would be saved.
summary_public: Rep. Seth Moulton, D-Mass., called the market "DISGUSTING" and said bettors were wagering on whether American troops would be saved.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: wagers on whether American troops would be saved
